original_description: Optimize a Claude Code plugin — reduce knowledge size, improve skill descriptions, remove dead references, condense verbose content. Use when the user asks to \"slim down\", \"clean up\", \"optimize\", \"reduce size\", \"make plugin smaller\", \"trim plugin\", \"reduce footprint\", or \"improve plugin quality\".
best_description: Optimize a Claude Code plugin — reduce knowledge size, improve skill descriptions, remove dead references, condense verbose content. Use when the user asks to \"slim down\", \"clean up\", \"optimize\", \"reduce size\", \"make plugin smaller\", \"trim plugin\", \"reduce footprint\", or \"improve plugin quality\".
final_description: Optimize a Claude Code plugin for size, quality, and cleanliness. Invoke this skill FIRST — before doing any work yourself — whenever the user wants to: reduce plugin file sizes or total footprint, condense or shrink knowledge files (especially when approaching KB limits), make a plugin smaller or leaner, clean up or remove dead/broken references from plugin files, sharpen or improve skill descriptions as part of optimization, or trim/condense verbose plugin content without losing information. Examples: "optimize my plugin", "slim down plugin-ops", "my knowledge dir is 45kb", "condense this 10kb file", "make my plugin smaller", "clean up broken refs", "reduce footprint", "improve plugin quality". NOT for: health audits/reports (use reflect), creating/iterating skills (use skill-creator), debugging triggers (use diagnose), or non-plugin cleanup tasks like git history.

history.description: Optimize a Claude Code plugin — reduce knowledge size, improve skill descriptions, remove dead references, condense verbose content. Use when the user asks to \"slim down\", \"clean up\", \"optimize\", \"reduce size\", \"make plugin smaller\", \"trim plugin\", \"reduce footprint\", or \"improve plugin quality\".

train_results.query: improve the quality of my plugin -- sharpen the skill descriptions, clean up broken refs, condense knowledge
the marketplace.md file in my plugin is over 10kb, can you condense it without losing important info?
make my plugin smaller -- check all knowledge and skill files for things that can be removed or condensed
my plugin's knowledge directory is 45kb and its getting close to the limit -- can you help me slim it down?
optimize plugin-ops -- I want to reduce the total footprint and remove any dead references
analyze my plugin health and write a full report to REFLECTIONS.md
create a new skill called 'lint' that runs eslint on the project
add my plugin to the ivintik marketplace so I can install it on other machines
can you iterate on my skill description with test prompts to improve triggering accuracy?
clean up my git history -- squash the last 5 commits into one
why isnt my skill triggering? it should fire when I say 'deploy to staging'

test_results.query: clean up my beads plugin -- theres probably duplicate content across knowledge files and some stale references
trim my plugin -- its gotten bloated with verbose knowledge files and I want to make it leaner
reduce the size of my plugin, some of the knowledge files have a lot of redundant content
optimize my postgresql queries -- they're running slow on the dashboard page
release my plugin version 2.0.0 with a git tag
refactor this typescript module to use dependency injection instead of singletons
review the architecture of my microservices project and suggest improvements

history.description: Analyze and optimize a Claude Code plugin to reduce its size, improve quality, and clean up issues. Use when the user wants to make a plugin smaller or leaner, condense or shrink knowledge files that are too large or approaching size limits, sharpen or improve skill descriptions, remove dead or broken references, or generally improve plugin quality. Triggers for plugin-level optimization work — reducing file sizes (KB), trimming verbose content, condensing markdown files without losing information, checking knowledge directories for bloat, and removing unnecessary or duplicate content from plugin files. Does NOT handle: plugin health audits/reports (use reflect), skill description testing/iteration (use skill-creator), plugin debugging (use diagnose), or non-plugin code cleanup.

history.description: Optimize a Claude Code plugin — reduce knowledge size, improve skill descriptions, remove dead references, condense verbose content. Use when the user asks to "slim down", "clean up", "optimize", "reduce size", "make plugin smaller", "trim plugin", "reduce footprint", "condense", "shrink", or "improve plugin quality". Also triggers when a user mentions a plugin file being too large (in KB), a knowledge directory approaching size limits, wanting to remove or condense things from plugin files, or wanting to sharpen skill descriptions as part of a cleanup pass. Covers any request to make a plugin leaner, smaller, or higher-quality by trimming, condensing, or removing content. Does NOT cover: health audits/reports (use reflect), skill description testing with eval loops (use skill-creator), or plugin debugging (use diagnose).
